description_long: This is a sealed packet of Indomie Mi Goreng instant noodles, featuring a rectangular, pillow-shaped form with crimped edges. The front of the package displays vibrant branding with the Indomie logo in blue and red, a green and yellow stripe, and an appetizing image of cooked noodles topped with a sunny-side-up egg, vegetables, and garnishes. The back of the packet is covered with detailed cooking instructions, nutritional information, and additional branding elements. The sides of the packet are plain white, showing the thickness and sealed seams of the packaging. The material appears to be a glossy, flexible plastic, typical for instant noodle packaging, with a slight puffiness indicating the presence of air inside. The overall appearance is clean, colorful, and designed to attract attention on store shelves or in urban environments.
description: A colorful, pillow-shaped Indomie Mi Goreng instant noodle packet with vibrant branding and a food image on the front, and detailed instructions on the back. The packaging is glossy, flexible plastic with crimped edges and a slightly puffed appearance.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the white, crimped edge of the packet with minimal visible branding.
description_view_1: The front view displays the Indomie logo, product name, and a vivid image of the prepared noodles with toppings.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, similar to view 0, shows the white, crimped edge with a hint of the front and back designs.
description_view_3: The back view reveals cooking instructions, nutritional facts, and additional branding in black and red text on a white background.
attribute_bowl_design: The bowl depicted on the package is round with a smooth, white ceramic appearance and a simple, clean rim. There are no visible decorative patterns or embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist and classic design. The bowl's shape is shallow and wide, providing a clear view of the contents.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Toppings are neatly arranged on top of the noodles, with a sunny-side-up egg placed centrally, surrounded by green herbs, sliced tomatoes, and a few other garnishes. The arrangement is visually balanced, with each topping occupying a distinct section of the bowl for an appetizing presentation.
attribute_noodle_visibility: The noodles are prominently displayed above the toppings, forming the main visual focus in the bowl. They are not submerged, but rather piled high and clearly visible.
attribute_broth_clarity: There is no visible broth in the bowl; the noodles appear dry, consistent with the Mi Goreng style. The surface is free of floating particles or oil.
attribute_utensil_presence: No utensils such as chopsticks, spoons, or forks are present in or around the bowl in the images.
